narrative:
Beavercreek City has 34,939 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.0 percentage points.
